note: Frozen source-log manifest for the missing-frontmatter investigation. These are the ONLY diagnostic log files (by basename + SHA-256) that contained genuine executor `failed to parse frontmatter output` emissions at investigation time. extract_genuine_emissions.py consumes THIS manifest (a frozen file list under <state_dir>/logs), verifies each file's SHA-256, and processes them in listed order, so its output is reproducible independent of later log growth. Absolute directory generalized to <state_dir>/logs.
